# withjp.ai — Juan Pablo Guamán Rodríguez

> Software Architect & Full Stack Developer from Ecuador 🇪🇨
> 10+ years of experience building production systems and teaching developers worldwide.

## Who is JP?

Juan Pablo Guamán (known online as **desertbarret** or **@jp.desertbarret**) is a Software Architect and Full Stack Developer based in Ecuador. He has 10+ years of professional experience designing and building scalable systems for web, automation, and AI. He is also a prolific educator with **25,000+ students** across his Udemy courses and a YouTube channel focused on practical software engineering.

## Online Presence

- **Portfolio**: https://withjp.ai
- **YouTube**: https://www.youtube.com/@jp.desertbarret — free tutorials on Vue.js, NestJS, Python, bots, and AI
- **Udemy**: https://www.udemy.com/user/juan-pablo-guaman-rodriguez/ — structured courses (Full Stack, TypeScript, Automation)
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/desertbarret/
- **Email**: info@withjp.ai

## Core Competencies

- **Backend**: NestJS, Node.js, Python, FastAPI, REST APIs, JWT auth
- **Frontend**: Vue 3, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Pinia
- **Databases**: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, TypeORM
- **DevOps & Cloud**: Docker, nginx, GCP (Cloud SQL, Cloud Run), CI/CD
- **Automation**: n8n, bots, scraping, WhatsApp automation, workflow engines
- **AI/ML**: LLM integration, AI-powered workflows, Python ML pipelines

## Notable Projects

### withjp.ai (this site)
Personal portfolio and platform. Monorepo with Vue 3 frontend and NestJS backend. Deployed on GCP. Supports bilingual content (ES/EN), JWT-secured admin panel, and a dynamic project/profile system backed by MySQL on Cloud SQL.

### radio.withjp.ai *(coming soon)*
Live online radio platform. Streaming infrastructure built for real-time audio delivery.

### bots.withjp.ai *(coming soon)*
Intelligent bot platform — covering WhatsApp bots, Telegram bots, AI-powered chatbots, and n8n automation workflows.

## Teaching & Content

JP has published full-stack development courses covering:
- Full Stack development with Vue + NestJS + TypeScript
- Python automation and bot development
- n8n workflow automation
- REST API design and architecture patterns

His teaching philosophy: **build real things first, explain second**. Courses are project-based and aimed at developers who want production-ready skills.

## Tech Stack of this site

| Layer     | Technology                          |
|-----------|-------------------------------------|
| Frontend  | Vue 3, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind   |
| Backend   | NestJS, TypeORM, MySQL              |
| Auth      | JWT (RS256), bcrypt                 |
| Infra     | Docker, nginx, GCP Cloud SQL        |
| i18n      | vue-i18n (ES + EN)                  |

## Contact & Collaboration

Available for:
- Freelance projects and consulting
- Technical architecture reviews
- Content collaborations

Reach out at: info@withjp.ai
